questions.question: On what 70's show would you enjoy the comedic timing of psychologist Dr. Robert Hartley, the antics of his nutty patients, and his wife Emily?
What U.S. male diver, considered the greatest of all time, was a gold medalist in the 1984 and 1988 Olympic games?
What Scot had 80's hits with the catchy tunes "Morning Train (Nine to Five)" and "Strut"?
In 1979, where in the U.S. did a nuclear power plant accident occur that spread fear about a possible disaster?
What TV character used to say, "Na-nu, na-nu"?
